# Pre Video Gate Checklist

- [ ] Script QA passed
- [ ] Storyboard QA passed
- [ ] Visual direction QA passed
- [ ] Static keyframe QA passed
- [ ] Platform specs valid
- [ ] Token reservation valid
- [ ] No blockers
- [ ] approved_for_video set
